healthy_description: Silver-gray needle-like foliage with strong fragrance. Purple flower spikes held above foliage. Dense, compact growth habit.

symptom_guide.symptom: Foliage turning brown or black from base up
symptom_guide.visual_description: Discoloration and wilting despite adequate moisture, stems become soft

symptom_guide.symptom: White powder on leaves and flowers
symptom_guide.visual_description: Fine white coating that easily rubs off, affects flower buds and stem tips

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown spots with gray centers on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Circular lesions with concentric rings, may have yellow halos

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellowing and decline of entire plant
symptom_guide.visual_description: Plant becomes pale yellow-green and stops growing, leaves droop
